[CRITICAL] payments: Payments-related path changed
  Message: File 'app/Http/Controllers/Webhooks/StripeWebhookController.php' matches path-classifier rule 'laravel.webhook-controllers' for category 'payments'.
  File: app/Http/Controllers/Webhooks/StripeWebhookController.php
  Detail: laravel.webhook-controllers
  Recommendation: Payment-related code is high-impact: bugs here can charge or refund the wrong amounts. Review the change against the payment-flow spec, verify with a sandbox transaction, and confirm webhook idempotency where relevant.

[HIGH] test-gap: Risky change without paired test: laravel.webhook-controllers
  Message: Changes to app/Http/Controllers/Webhooks/StripeWebhookController.php were not paired with a sibling test change in the same diff
  File: app/Http/Controllers/Webhooks/StripeWebhookController.php
  Detail: path-rule: laravel.webhook-controllers
  Recommendation: Add or update sibling tests for this change in the same diff. Risky-area changes without paired test changes are difficult to verify and easy to regress. If the change is intentionally test-exempt (e.g., a pure config tweak), document the exemption in the change description.
